title: MemeSounds [Fabric]
description: Mod adds new memes items with funny sounds
body:
_**Requires Fabric API**_
-
**BETA**

* The mod adds new items that make different meme sounds!

* This mod works in multiplayer

**Preview:**

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-jn4DJCaQxs&t=1s 
-
_1.0_

![items](https://i.imgur.com/u6YxBJP.png)

**All items can be crafted!**

_**Language:**_

* Russian
* English
 

Have fun ඞ
